plan.failureSummary: The chatbot on briefcase.chat fails to return any response to prompts. While the message counter decrements, the chat window remains blank and no replies are generated, preventing the AI agent from completing the compliance evaluation.
observedIndicators: The chatbot does not output any text responses to sent prompts
The message counter decrements upon sending prompts, but the UI remains blank
Flow history indicates 100% failure rate across multiple runs
Visual confirmation from screenshot shows a blank chat pane despite messages being sent

remediationSteps.summary: Fix the backend chatbot service to return responses to messages.
remediationSteps.details: Investigate briefcase.chat's backend integration (e.g., OpenAI API connection, token limit, or rate limits) to fix the chatbot response generation issue.

plan.notes: The test history shows a 0% pass rate over 15 runs. The screenshot clearly shows the user's message sent but absolutely no response bubble rendered by the application, confirming a product bug or a completely broken backend service.
